title: subworkflow - orchestration dependency recovery backup and validate
description: Orchestration subworkflow for dependency-recovery / backup-and-validate.\n\nThis workflow coordinates remediation or control-plane actions and always enforces execute -> wait -> check so actions are never fire-and-forget.
guide:
## Orchestration subworkflow for dependency-recovery / backup-and-validate.

### 🎯 Purpose
- Orchestrate dependency recovery with backup and validate and enforced post-action verification.

### ⚙️ Execution Pattern
- ▶️ Execute a primary Dynatrace action
- ⏳ Wait for completion/stabilization
- ✅ Check terminal status and fail when unsuccessful

### 🧩 Primary Action
- **dynatrace.github.connector:create-or-replace-file**

### 🔐 Safety
- ❌ No fire-and-forget behavior
- ✅ Retries are enabled for wait stabilization checks

check-status.name: check-status
check-status.description: Final status validation for orchestration action.
